race.comment: OYSTER LANE (4) is long overdue for the matinee win. Placed 6/11 so far including 2/4 this trip. Has been going around in richer maidens, two back finishing not far away at Caulfield before being runner-up latest at Pakenham.  Looks well placed here. Gets his chance. SILVER MAID (12) is far less experienced but has good upside. Safely held on debut then improved sharply at her second outing over a little extra ground to place. The 1400m suits and with further improvement will go close. SPIKE ALMIGHTY (5) has been thereabouts without winning. Blinkers added and looks a winning chance if at his best. STAR OF RAVENNA (13) goes well at today's journey and should take catching.
